text:
(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #4)

> Moved to the handbook list

Please, can you clarify? 

For tracking purposes; a URL will help. 

<https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/TriageTraining#Statuses>

Also, please note that it's customary to take a report when closing. 

<https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/TriageTraining#closure>

Thanks
